full_name: Grey (lamellar/flake graphite) cast iron EN-GJL-250, number EN-JL1040
scope: Lamellar (flake) graphite grey cast iron classified by tensile strength on machined test pieces. Good machinability, vibration damping and moderate strength; used for machine frames, engine blocks, pump and turbine casings, and general engineering castings. Equivalent to former GG25.

chemical_composition.note: EN 1561 classifies by tensile strength (or hardness), not fixed composition. Typical foundry ranges below.

mechanical_properties.condition: as-cast (30 mm separately cast test bar)

license_note: EN-GJL-250 grade designation and its tensile strength requirement are widely reproduced in free foundry datasheets and reference sites; composition is typical foundry practice, not reproduced EN text.
